title: xtra molten Kenyan goats cheese pilaf
description: A jammy, molten, crowd-pleaser Kenyan dish featuring goats cheese, poached to perfection. Sugar-free friendly and perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large bamboo steamer over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion, carrots, and green pepper to the steamer and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the uncooked jasmine rice to the steamer and stir to combine with the vegetables and garlic.
Add the coconut milk to the steamer and stir to combine with the rice mixture.
Reduce the heat to low and cover the steamer with a tight-fitting lid.
Poach the goats cheese in the steamer for 10-12 minutes, or until it is melted and slightly charred.
Season the pilaf with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the pilaf hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
